rules.rule_text:
rule win_mal_AstarionRAT
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects AstarionRAT"
		date = "2/14/2025"
		hash = "a508d0bb583dc6e5f97b6094f8f910b5b6f2b9d5528c04e4dee62c343fce6f4b"

	strings:
		$s1 = "s5://%s:%s@%s:%d"
		$s2 = "Failed to connect to the server"
		$s3 = "Impersonated"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and all of them
}
